reviews.review_description:
Ivanovich Games always deliver titles with real depth and polished mechanics (Operation Warcade, 1976: Back to Midway — absolute gems), so I was instantly curious when Balloon Duel dropped. And wow — this one absolutely delivers.

As a big Mixed Reality fan, I love how the game blends genres: you’re squaring off against a robot opponent, trying to keep your balloon afloat while using portals, fans, and other clever mechanics to sabotage their strategy. It’s surprisingly strategic, endlessly fun, and wildly nostalgic.

There’s something hilarious about sprinting around your space, diving to rescue a balloon inches from the floor, and shouting at an invisible robot who just scored a point. It’s peak VR ridiculousness in the best possible way — and a sneaky workout too. Daily steps? Cardio? Done.

A joyful, clever MR experience that lets you be a kid again. It’s FUN.
